services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: What We Do
services.description: Full-spectrum digital marketing built to scale your business. From strategy to execution, we deliver measurable results.
services.pricingDescription: Choose the tier that fits your stage. Scale up anytime.
services.ctaDescription: Book a free strategy call and let's map out your growth roadmap together.

about.title: We Are Collaborative
about.subtitle: Our Story
about.missionHeadline: Built for the brands that refuse to blend in
about.missionP1: We Are Collaborative was founded on a simple idea: great marketing happens when strategy meets creativity meets relentless execution. We don't just run campaigns — we build growth systems that compound over time.
about.missionP2: Our team blends data-driven performance marketing with bold creative thinking. No templates. No generic playbooks. Every engagement is custom-built around your goals, your audience, and your market position.
about.ctaDescription: Ready to turn strategy into results? Let's talk about what we can build for your brand.

academy.title: WAC Academy
academy.subtitle: Learn & Grow
academy.description: Master digital marketing with expert-led courses. From SEO fundamentals to advanced affiliate strategies — learn at your pace.
academy.expertLedDesc: Learn from practitioners who've scaled real businesses — not just theorists.
academy.practicalDesc: Every module includes real-world projects, templates, and frameworks you can use immediately.
academy.communityDesc: Join a network of ambitious marketers. Share wins, get feedback, grow together.
academy.ctaDescription: Invest in your skills. Join thousands of marketers leveling up with WAC Academy.
academy.levelCtaDesc: Join the next cohort and start building real marketing skills that drive revenue.
